basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group. Research focuses on natural language processing, LLM reasoning, and vision-language models.

work.name: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
work.description: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

publications.name: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond
publications.summary: SynLogic synthesizes verifiable reasoning data at scale for learning logical reasoning.

publications.name: On the Perception Bottleneck of VLMs for Chart Understanding
publications.summary: Investigates the perception bottleneck in vision-language models for chart understanding.

publications.name: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
publications.summary: Analyzes the universal truthfulness hyperplane inside large language models.

publications.name: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
publications.summary: Proposes in-context sharpness as alerts for hallucination mitigation from an inner representation perspective.

publications.name: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
publications.summary: A comprehensive Chinese evaluation suite for foundation models across multiple disciplines.

publications.name: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
publications.summary: Explores composing parameter-efficient modules with arithmetic operations.
